Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
21 
DRUG_MEDICARE 
LABEL: 
Drug Use Disorders End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for drug use disorder as of the 
end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: DRUG_MEDICARE 
LONG NAME: DRUG_MEDICARE 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived)
